title: calophyllum oliganthum
intro: Calophyllum oliganthum, a species of evergreen tree, belongs to the family Calophyllaceae, native to the tropical regions of Borneo and Sumatra. The bark of Calophyllum oliganthum is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Calophyllum oliganthum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to have potential in reducing pain and inflammation, as well as protecting against cell damage. Calophyllum oliganthum is often used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, decoctions, and infusions, which are believed to have therapeutic effects when consumed or applied topically.
